Label: /FR-U-10/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if no neural networks are available.
Correction: The system shall display a message 'No neural networks available' if the list is empty.

Label: /FR-U-20/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the user selects an invalid neural network.
Correction: The system shall display an error message 'Invalid neural network selected' if the user selects an invalid neural network.

Label: /FR-U-30/
Issue: Does not specify supported file formats for importing neural network topology.
Correction: The system shall support importing neural network topologies in ONNX format.

Label: /FR-U-40/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if no hardware components are available.
Correction: The system shall display a message 'No hardware components available' if the list is empty.

Label: /FR-U-50/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the user selects an invalid hardware component.
Correction: The system shall display an error message 'Invalid hardware component selected' if the user selects an invalid hardware component.

Label: /FR-U-60/
Issue: Does not specify supported file formats for importing images.
Correction: The system shall support importing images in JPEG, JPG, and PNG formats.

Label: /FR-U-70/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the user tries to remove an image that is not imported.
Correction: The system shall display an error message 'No image to remove' if the user tries to remove an image that is not imported.

Label: /FR-U-80/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the inference fails.
Correction: The system shall display an error message 'Inference failed' if the inference process fails.

Label: /FR-U-100/
Issue: Does not specify the format of the diagnostic data.
Correction: The diagnostic data shall include inference result, confidence score, latency, hardware information, and neural network identifier.

Label: /FR-U-110/
Issue: Does not specify the format in which results and diagnostic data are exported.
Correction: The system shall export results and diagnostic data in a CSV file format.

Label: /FR-U-120/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the user tries to abort an inference that is not running.
Correction: The system shall display an error message 'No inference to abort' if the user tries to abort an inference that is not running.

Label: /FR-U-130/
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of images that can be selected for batch processing.
Correction: The system shall allow a maximum of 10 images to be selected for batch processing.

Label: /FR-U-140/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the user tries to reorder images when no images are imported.
Correction: The system shall display an error message 'No images to reorder' if the user tries to reorder images when no images are imported.

Label: /FR-U-150/
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of hardware components that can be selected for batch processing.
Correction: The system shall allow a maximum of 5 hardware components to be selected for batch processing.

Label: /FR-U-160/
Issue: Does not specify the types of graphs that will be shown for benchmarking.
Correction: The system shall display performance graphs including latency, throughput, and resource utilization for benchmarking.

Label: /FR-U-170/
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of inference runs that can be specified.
Correction: The system shall allow a maximum of 100 inference runs to be specified with the same arguments.

Label: /FR-U-180/
Issue: Does not specify the languages supported for the user interface.
Correction: The system shall support English, German, and French languages for the user interface.

Label: /FR-U-190/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the user tries to remove a neural network that is not in the list.
Correction: The system shall display an error message 'Neural network not found' if the user tries to remove a neural network that is not in the list.

Label: /FR-A-10/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the user interface update fails.
Correction: The system shall display an error message 'User interface update failed' if the user interface update fails.

Label: /FR-A-20/
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of image previews that can be shown.
Correction: The system shall display a maximum of 10 image previews in the user interface.

Label: /FR-A-30/
Issue: Does not specify the types of conflicts that will be checked for arguments.
Correction: The system shall check for conflicts including invalid file formats, unsupported hardware, and missing arguments.

Label: /FR-A-40/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the start button remains disabled due to missing arguments.
Correction: The system shall display a message 'Please select all required arguments' if the start button remains disabled due to missing arguments.

Label: /FR-A-60/
Issue: Does not specify the format of the completion message.
Correction: The completion message shall include 'Inference completed successfully' and the time taken for the inference.

Label: /FR-A-70/
Issue: Does not specify the format of the run-time log file.
Correction: The run-time log file shall be in plain text format and include timestamps for each event.

Label: /FR-A-80/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the arguments cannot be preserved.
Correction: The system shall display an error message 'Failed to preserve arguments' if the arguments cannot be preserved.

Label: /PD10/
Issue: Does not specify the minimum height and width for input images.
Correction: The height and width of input images shall be at least 224 pixels.

Label: /PD20/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the imported neural network is not compatible with the hardware.
Correction: The system shall display an error message 'Neural network not compatible with selected hardware' if the imported neural network is not compatible.

Label: /PD30/
Issue: Does not specify the format of the inference results and diagnostic data.
Correction: The inference results and diagnostic data shall be in JSON format.

Label: /PD40/
Issue: Does not specify the format of the run-time log file.
Correction: The run-time log file shall be in plain text format.

Label: /PD50/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the translation files are missing.
Correction: The system shall display an error message 'Translation files missing' if the translation files are not found.

Label: /TC-INI-10/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the program fails to start.
Correction: The system shall display an error message 'Program failed to start' if the program fails to launch.

Label: /TC-INI-20/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the hardware component or neural network selection fails.
Correction: The system shall display an error message 'Selection failed' if the hardware component or neural network selection fails.

Label: /TC-INI-30/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the image removal fails.
Correction: The system shall display an error message 'Image removal failed' if the image removal process fails.

Label: /TC-INF-10/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the inference process fails.
Correction: The system shall display an error message 'Inference process failed' if the inference process fails.

Label: /TC-INF-20/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the imported neural network is invalid.
Correction: The system shall display an error message 'Invalid neural network' if the imported neural network is invalid.

Label: /TC-INF-30/
Issue: Does not specify the format of the inference results and diagnostic data.
Correction: The inference results and diagnostic data shall be displayed in a tabular format.

Label: /TC-INF-40/
Issue: Does not specify the format in which results and diagnostic data are exported.
Correction: The system shall export results and diagnostic data in a CSV file format.

Label: /TC-INF-50/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the used arguments cannot be preserved.
Correction: The system shall display an error message 'Failed to preserve arguments' if the used arguments cannot be preserved.

Label: /TC-ERR-10/
Issue: Does not specify the types of errors that can occur when importing an invalid neural network.
Correction: The system shall display specific error messages for different types of errors, such as 'File format not supported' or 'File corrupted'.

Label: /TC-ERR-20/
Issue: Does not specify the types of errors that can occur when selecting a missing hardware component.
Correction: The system shall display specific error messages for different types of errors, such as 'Hardware component not found' or 'Hardware component not supported'.

Label: /TC-ERR-30/
Issue: Does not specify the types of errors that can occur when importing an invalid image.
Correction: The system shall display specific error messages for different types of errors, such as 'File format not supported' or 'File corrupted'.

Label: /TC-ERR-40/
Issue: Does not specify the types of errors that can occur when importing an invalid image after a valid image.
Correction: The system shall display specific error messages for different types of errors, such as 'File format not supported' or 'File corrupted'.

Label: /TC-OPT-10/
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the abort process fails.
Correction: The system shall display an error message 'Abort process failed' if the abort process fails.

Label: /TC-OPT-20/

Correction: The system shall display an error message 'Intel Movidius detection failed' if the automatic detection process fails.

Label: /TC-OPT-30/

Correction: The system shall allow a maximum of 10 images to be imported for batch processing.

Correction: The system shall allow a maximum of 5 hardware components to be selected for batch processing.

Label: /TC-OPT-50/
Issue: Does not specify the types of benchmark statistics that will be shown.
Correction: The system shall display benchmark statistics including latency, throughput, and resource utilization.

Label: /TC-OPT-60/
